story.heading: For the woman who wants both.
story.bodyOne: Dusk lives in the in-between: that golden hour where understated elegance meets quiet boldness.
story.bodyTwo: Every month includes one statement piece you might not buy for yourself but end up wearing constantly.

finalCta.heading: Start with Dusk.
finalCta.body: $88 per month. Four pieces. $200+ value. Free shipping. Skip anytime. Twelve-month warranty on every piece.

experienceSteps.title: Ships on the 15th
experienceSteps.body: Every Dusk box ships monthly via priority mail and arrives within three to five business days.

experienceSteps.title: Signature Packaging
experienceSteps.body: A matte black box with gold foil lettering, wrapped in tissue and finished with a care card.

experienceSteps.title: 4 Curated Pieces
experienceSteps.body: Each piece arrives in its own pouch and is ready to wear or gift immediately.

experienceSteps.title: Style Card Included
experienceSteps.body: A styling guide walks through pairings, care tips, and the story behind the month.

reviews.name: Mia R.
reviews.body: Dusk is the perfect sweet spot. I get one statement piece every month that I would never have chosen for myself, but I wear constantly.

reviews.name: Claire T.
reviews.body: I upgraded from Haze to Dusk and the jump in quality is obvious. The 14k gold-fill pieces feel genuinely luxurious.

reviews.name: Aaliyah J.
reviews.body: Love the curation and the themes. The November box was stunning and felt like opening a gift to myself.

faqs.question: What exactly do I get in the Dusk box each month?
faqs.answer: Four jewelry pieces: typically a necklace, earrings, a ring or bracelet, and one guaranteed statement piece.

faqs.question: How is Dusk different from Haze or Lune?
faqs.answer: Dusk sits between Haze and Lune with a guaranteed statement piece, collaboration access, and the most gift-friendly monthly value.

faqs.question: Can I choose what pieces I receive?
faqs.answer: The curation is editor-led, but you can update style notes, sizes, and metal preferences in your profile at any time.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my box tier?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can switch tiers any time from the member dashboard and the change applies on the next billing cycle.
